pricing.detail.empty: Open a product to inspect variant prices, currency coverage and sale markers from the pricing route.
pricing.detail.contextSubtitle: Apply currency, region and quantity to resolve the effective admin-side price for each variant without leaving the pricing module.
pricing.detail.subtitle: Inspect currency coverage, compare-at pricing and sale visibility from the pricing-owned route.
pricing.detail.title: Pricing Detail
pricing.detail.transportGap: This route already owns pricing visibility, effective-context inspection, base-row and active price-list write actions, plus price-list rule and scope editing. The remaining backlog is the broader promotions engine, not the core pricing transport path.
pricing.edit.title: Base pricing
pricing.adjustment.title: Base-row adjustment
pricing.adjustment.scope: Targets the canonical base row or the selected active price-list override
pricing.rule.title: Active price-list rule
pricing.rule.subtitle: Configure a percentage rule that resolves from base prices when this active price list has no explicit override row.
pricing.list.empty: No products match the current filters.
pricing.list.subtitle: Search the catalog and open a product to inspect variant-level price coverage owned by the pricing boundary.
pricing.list.title: Pricing Feed
pricing.stat.currenciesHint: Distinct currency codes across the selected product.
pricing.stat.onSaleHint: Variants with at least one sale-marked price.
pricing.stat.pricedHint: Variants that already have at least one configured price.
pricing.stat.variantsHint: Tracked SKUs in the selected product.
pricing.subtitle: Module-owned pricing surface for price visibility, effective-context inspection and base-price write actions, while rule-driven pricing transport is still being split from the umbrella transport.
pricing.title: Pricing Control
